calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-06-2013 Off Calendar

Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar May-21-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Paul H. Alvarado, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Sydney Elise Fairbairn, Esq. appeared for plaintif Hauser & Sons, Inc., d/b/a Hauser Shade Company.
Ken Hauser, President of Hauser & Sons, Inc., d/b/a Hauser Shade Company, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Norman Ng, d/b/a Eagle Lighting Cover.
Default was entered against defendant on March 5, 2012.
Doe defendants were dismissed on August 6, 2012.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Hauser & Sons, Inc., d/b/a Hauser Shade Company, and against the Defaulted Defendant Norman Ng, d/b/a Eagle Lighting Cover, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $53,133.59.
Prejudgment Interest - $18,109.52.
Attorney Fees - $800.00.
Costs - $715.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $72,758.11.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-27-2013 Continued To Jun-25-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Appearance by Sydney Elise Fairbairn, Esq. for Plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to JUN-25-2013 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)
